# explosionproofradios.com

> Compare every ATEX and IECEx certified explosion proof two-way radio for Zone 1 and Zone 2 hazardous areas.

## What This Site Covers
- ATEX and IECEx certified two-way radios (DMR, TETRA, PoC)
- Zone 1 and Zone 2 portable radio comparison
- Specifications verified against manufacturer certificates of conformity
- Safety features: Man Down, Lone Worker, GPS, encryption

## Radios Indexed
- Motorola DP4401Ex (DMR, Zone 1)
- Motorola DP4801Ex (DMR, Zone 1)
- Motorola MTP8550Ex (TETRA, Zone 1)
- Kenwood NX-230EXE (NXDN, Zone 1, VHF)
- Kenwood NX-330EXE (NXDN, Zone 1, UHF)
- Sepura STP8X000 (TETRA, Zone 1)
- i.safe MOBILE IS440.1 (PoC/LTE, Zone 1)

- Home: https://explosionproofradios.com/
- Sitemap: https://explosionproofradios.com/sitemap.xml
